---
title: "?? ??"
date: 2026-03-14
description: "? ?? ? ???? ??? ?????."
categories: [Category, Topic]
toc: true
---

::: {.article-subtitle}
? ?? ??? ??? ?? ???? ???? ???.
:::

<div class="language-toggle" role="group" aria-label="Language switch">
  <a class="language-toggle__link" href="/articles/article-slug/en.html" lang="en">EN</a>
  <a class="language-toggle__link is-active" href="/articles/article-slug/ko.html" lang="ko">KO</a>
</div>

## ??
??? ????, ? ????, ??? ???? ???? ???.

## ??
??? ?? ??? ? ??? ??? ??? ???.

> ?? ??, ?? ??, ?? ??? `blockquote`? ????.

## ?? ????
?? ????? ?? ??? ???? ????.

- ???? ??? ???? ???.
- ? bullet? ??? ???? ???.
- ??? ??? ??? ???? ???? ????.

## ????
??? ??? ???? ? ?? ?????? ??.

```{mermaid fig-cap="?????? ??? ????? ???? ???? ?????."}
flowchart LR
  A[??] --> B[??]
  B --> C[??]
```

## ??
?? ??? ?? ??? file-tree block?? ????.

```{.text .file-tree-block}
Project/
|-- app/
|-- docs/
`-- tests/
```

## ??
??? ??, ???, ? ??? `inline code`? ????.
?? ??? ?? ???? ???.

```python
from pathlib import Path

root = Path("AI_OS")
print(root.exists())
```

## ??
?? ??? ??? ?? ?? ????.

| ?? | ?? |
|---|---|
| Search | Perplexity |
| Build | ChatGPT / Codex |

## ????
???? ??? ??? repository/reference card? ????.

::: {.repository-card}
[project-name](https://example.com)

? ???, ??, ?? ??? ? ???? ?? ????.
:::

## ??
?? ??? ?? ????, ????? ??? takeaway? ???.
